code:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None

class LinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None

    def add_node(self, data):
        new_node = Node(data)
        if not self.head:
            self.head = new_node
            return
        current = self.head
        while current.next:
            current = current.next
        current.next = new_node

    def create_cycle(self, pos):
        if pos < 0:
            return

        cycle_start_node = None
        tail = None
        current = self.head
        count = 0

        if not self.head:
            return

        while current:
            if count == pos:
                cycle_start_node = current
            if current.next is None:
                tail = current
            current = current.next
            count += 1

        if tail and cycle_start_node:
            tail.next = cycle_start_node

    def detect_cycle(self):
        if not self.head or not self.head.next:
            return False

        slow = self.head
        fast = self.head

        while fast and fast.next:
            slow = slow.next
            fast = fast.next.next

            if slow == fast:
                return True
        return False

if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Örnek 1: Döngü olmayan bir bağlı liste
    ll_no_cycle = LinkedList()
    ll_no_cycle.add_node(1)
    ll_no_cycle.add_node(2)
    ll_no_cycle.add_node(3)
    ll_no_cycle.add_node(4)
    ll_no_cycle.add_node(5)

    print(f"Döngü olmayan listede döngü var mı?: {ll_no_cycle.detect_cycle()}")

    # Örnek 2: Döngüsü olan bir bağlı liste
    ll_with_cycle = LinkedList()
    ll_with_cycle.add_node(10)
    ll_with_cycle.add_node(20)
    ll_with_cycle.add_node(30)
    ll_with_cycle.add_node(40)
    ll_with_cycle.add_node(50)

    # 20 değerindeki düğüme işaret eden bir döngü oluştur (indeks 1)
    ll_with_cycle.create_cycle(1) 

    print(f"Döngülü listede döngü var mı?: {ll_with_cycle.detect_cycle()}")

    # Örnek 3: Tek elemanlı ve döngüsüz liste
    ll_single_node = LinkedList()
    ll_single_node.add_node(100)
    print(f"Tek elemanlı listede döngü var mı?: {ll_single_node.detect_cycle()}")

    # Örnek 4: Boş liste
    ll_empty = LinkedList()
    print(f"Boş listede döngü var mı?: {ll_empty.detect_cycle()}")
